data.body: Fix in PR #69 (branch fix/janitor-tickets-gc, off origin/main): _is_entry strips the 'tickets-' prefix before the hex check so tickets-<sha> entries are GC'd + byte-counted like code <sha> entries. RED->GREEN regression test (test_evicts_stale_pinned_ticket_store_entry) + mutation-checked; 17 janitor tests pass; lint+typecheck green. Ready to close once #69 merges.
